author: PC Gamer
text:
Bungie will let Destiny 2 'near infinite damage' bug ride for a week: 'Do your thing'
Players are also back to punting bosses off of ledges.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Attention former 2000s youths: A second Beyblade-inspired roguelike has hit Steam Next Fest
It's a big year for battle tops.

author: PC Gamer
text:
'World of Warcraft Camelot' is a mysterious new branch of the MMO that Blizzard fans are convinced is the first real evidence of a remixed WoW Classic
September's BlizzCon might be where we finally hear about "WoW Classic Plus".

author: PC Gamer
text:
All Grow a Garden 2 codes for June 2026: Earn sheckles with free seeds
Start growing your garden with active codes for seeds and other freebies.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Less than a month before launch, survival RPG Outward 2 delayed into 2027
"I apologize that we couldn’t give you the game you guys deserve on time. "

author: PC Gamer
text:
Overwatch season 3 kicks off with the gift of Jetpack Cat nerfs after the Apache helicopter meta dominated the World Cup
Shoot the cat down.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Sega says it made a 'life-sized figure containing Sonic's DNA,' and I have a few questions
According to Sega, Sonic's DNA "essence" has been captured with "cutting-edge biotechnology."

author: PC Gamer
text:
Silicon Motion says 'the retail SSD market has almost disappeared' as NAND shifts towards AI servers and OEMs scoop up the drives that usually sit in our gaming PCs
Yet another day during the RAMpocalypse.

author: PC Gamer
text:
An obscure new game-breaking Destiny bug lets you one-hit bosses, and I don't think Bungie's gonna let this one slide (Update: Bungie is letting it slide... for a little bit)
Somehow, the Cratening has returned.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Thanks for the Soup is the most fun I've had in a horror game in a long time, and that's owing to the broccoli
Broccoli seeds + medium fertilizer = cash.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Rode NT1 5th Generation microphone review
An unclippable king of the digital and analogue realms.

author: PC Gamer
text:
I've been waiting 20 years for a worthy sequel to my favourite life sim, but THQ Nordic has other ideas
The Guild: Europa 1410 ain't it.

author: PC Gamer
text:
One lone legend waiting for GTA 6 to launch has decided to make the game from scratch themselves: 'The goal: beat the real GTA 6 to launch'
Vibe code GTA 6? Sure, hold my beer.

author: PC Gamer
text:
A new flip phone that blocks social media at a system level is coming out, and you'll never guess which retro gaming company is making it
It's billed as 'less scroll, and more soul.'

author: PC Gamer
text:
Embark is finally cracking down on Arc Raiders' cheaters and duplication antics: 'Our commitment to anti-cheat initiatives remains a top priority'
Denuvo Anti-Cheat is rolling out to the masses.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Phanteks XT View Matrix case review
Ding ding ding, we have a winner.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Mistfall Hunter's demo might finally convince me, a souls sicko, to give extraction games a proper go—even if it's more modern God of War than Nightreign
Kratos, is that you?

author: PC Gamer
text:
Arc Raiders is finally testing a ban on free loadouts, and I'm here for it
Embark is grabbing the science kit and monitoring your feedback.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Intel's first chip with Nvidia graphics is coming in early 2028 according to the latest leak and it could mark a new era for handheld PC gaming
Nvidia's second-gen RTX Spark is also due in 2028 and AMD has new chips coming, too.

author: PC Gamer
text:
SteelSeries Arctis Nova 7X Wireless Gen 2 review
A helpful refinement.

author: PC Gamer
text:
There are stirrings in the VR industry that much better displays could be in the pipeline
Samsung is apparently leaning more heavily into Micro-OLED.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Viewsonic unveils the world's first 24-inch 4K gaming monitor for super crispy visuals in a smaller form factor
160 Hz and 1 ms response, to boot.

author: PC Gamer
text:
I already like the new survival horror Hellraiser game more than the movie
This may be the horniest horror game ever made.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Noctua's AIO liquid cooler is here but hooo boy is it expensive
Featuring the best fans and a custom pump cover.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Today I learned the real reason Warhammer 40k's iconic 'Land Raider' got its name and it ain't because it raids the land
Tanks for asking.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Modular laptop maker Framework forced to push SSD prices even higher but says DDR5 is 'stable'
Have RAM prices peaked?

author: PC Gamer
text:

Collect materials to show off your achievements.

author: PC Gamer
text:

Uncover old relics and earn the Saltwalker outfit.

author: PC Gamer
text:

author: PC Gamer
text:

The makers might be heavily into AI, but its chair design is all about humans.
